abilities.name: Toughness Boost
abilities.effect: Your Single Strike Pokémon in play, except any Abomasnow, get +50 HP. You can't apply more than 1 Toughness Boost Ability at a time.

abilities.name: Apple Drop
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If you placed any damage counters in this way, shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.

attacks.name: Acid Spray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Deep Sea King
abilities.effect: When your Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, you may move any amount of Water Energy from that Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Aqua Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Ice Dance
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Water Pokémon.

abilities.name: Shining Arcana
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and attach any number of basic Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Put the other cards into your hand.

attacks.name: Brainwave
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Hurried Gait
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may draw a card.

attacks.name: Extrasensory
attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Rapid Strike Squad
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Rapid Strike Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Timber Cleave
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Berserker Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Hustle Bark
abilities.effect: If your opponent has any Pokémon VMAX in play, this Pokémon's attacks cost ColorlessColorlessColorless less.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Untamed Shout
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Obstruct
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

abilities.name: Metal Transfer
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may move a Metal Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Stand Sentry
abilities.effect: Basic Energy attached to your Benched Pokémon can't be discarded by an effect of your opponent's Item or Supporter cards.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Spiral
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage for each Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Glacial Lance
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ride of the High King
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Max Lance
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 2 Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 120 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Reconstitute
abilities.effect: You must discard 2 cards from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw a card.

attacks.name: Psyray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Shadow Mist
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Special Energy or Stadium cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Astral Barrage
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon and put 5 damage counters on each of them.

abilities.name: Underworld Door
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Psychic Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Max Geist
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Fighting Instinct
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's attacks cost Colorless less for each of your opponent's Pokémon V in play.

attacks.name: Thunderous Kick
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Direflame Wings
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon. You can't use more than 1 Direflame Wings Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Aura Burn
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Intrepid Sword
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and attach any number of Metal Energy cards you find there to this Pokémon. Put the other cards into your hand. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Brave Blade
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

abilities.name: Dauntless Shield
abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon VMAX.

attacks.name: Assault Tackle
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sonic Strike
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 220 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

cards.name: Allister
cards.effect: Draw 3 cards. If you drew any cards in this way, discard up to 3 cards from your hand. (You must discard at least 1 card.)

cards.name: Bea
cards.effect: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck, and attach any Energy cards you discarded in this way to your Benched Fighting Pokémon in any way you like.

cards.name: Melony
cards.effect: Attach a Water Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon V. If you do, draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Milo
cards.effect: Discard up to 2 cards from your hand, and draw 2 cards for each card you discarded in this way.

cards.name: Piers
cards.effect: Search your deck for an Energy card and a Darkness Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Ride of the High King
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Max Lance
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 2 Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 120 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Underworld Door
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Psychic Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Max Geist
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
